query: SELECT p.name as places_name, p.atollId, ig.name as guide_name, ig.atoll as guide_atoll, ig.featured, ig.published FROM places p LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON p.name = ig.name WHERE p.atollId = 3 AND p.type = 'island' ORDER BY p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT p.name as places_name, p.atollId, ig.name as guide_name, ig.atoll as guide_atoll, ig.featured, ig.published FROM places p LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON p.name = ig.name WHERE p.atollId = 3 AND p.type = 'island' ORDER BY p.name;
